title: Hermes Agent 5.0 (New Upgrades): HERMES BECAME ULTRA-HERMES!
summary: Hermes Agent 0.16 (Surface release) introduces a native desktop app for macOS, Linux, and Windows with chat and file handling, remote gateway support, an enhanced web dashboard with admin controls, improved model picker with fuzzy search, and slash undo functionality. The release also strengthens security through patched dependencies and safer subprocess handling.
